nasb.text: So Solomon’s builders and Hiram’s builders and the Gebalites cut them, and prepared the timbers and the stones to build the house.

esv.text: So Solomon’s builders and Hiram’s builders and the men of Gebal did the cutting and prepared the timber and the stone to build the house.

cnv.text: 所羅門的工匠、希蘭的工匠和迦巴勒人把石頭鑿好，又預備建造殿宇用的木料和石料。

ccb.text: 于是，所罗门和希兰的工匠及迦巴勒人凿好石头，备好木料，准备建殿。
